div.p: Join a team delivering industrial and infrastructure excellence with safety, innovation, and growth.

At PETRORAQ, we empower our people to grow, innovate, and make an impact. We foster a culture of safety, collaboration, and excellence while delivering meaningful projects that shape communities and industries.
Professional Resources
Years of Excellence
Projects
Across the Kingdom
Attractive salary packages and performance-based incentives.
Continuous learning opportunities and career growth pathways.
A strong commitment to health, safety, and environment.
Work on challenging industrial and infrastructure projects.
Team collaboration ensures safe, efficient, and timely civil project delivery.
We recognize achievements and celebrate our people.

input.placeholder: Search jobs by title, department, or location...

div.t-att-data-search: '%s %s %s %s' % (job.name or '', job.department_id.name if job.department_id else '', job.address_id.city if job.address_id and job.address_id.city else '', job.contract_type_id.name if job._fields.get('contract_type_id') and job.contract_type_id else '')

div.h3: No open positions at the moment
div.p: Please check back soon or submit your CV for future opportunities!
Try another title, department, or location.
Submit your application and CV online.
Our team reviews your qualifications and experience.
Shortlisted candidates will be invited for interviews.
Successful candidates receive an offer.
Welcome to the team! Let's build the future together.
Higher management's meeting with Chinese delegation, exploring the opportunities for collaboration, growth and joint ventures.
Received award from H.E Mr. Ahmad Farooq (Ambassador of Pakistan to Saudi Arabia) during a business meetup organized by PEF.
Managing Director Mr. Mustafa Abdul Rasheed is meeting with clients to discuss their needs and provide solutions.
A team of dedicated professionals working together to deliver exceptional results by collaboration, expertise, and commitment.
A Chinese delegation visited us to explore strategic business opportunities, potential avenues for collaboration and growth.
A gathering of employees, clients, and their families to celebrate the blessings of Ramadan and strengthen bonds of unity and gratitude.
PETRORAQ provides a flexible work environment where professionals are encouraged to work independently or collaborate as strong team players.
PETRORAQ’s team attended the PEF Business Meetup – Dammam Chapter and proudly represented our organization among leading professionals and business leaders.
PETRORAQ proudly represented the company’s vision at the PEF Business Meetup by highlighting our commitment to growth, innovation, and collaboration.
IT team works with a collaborative spirit, supporting each department through reliable systems, smart solutions, and continuous improvement.
Building tomorrow with precision, safety, and vision, where every blueprint becomes reality through dedication, leadership, and excellence on site.
A collaborative, inclusive, and respectful environment where everyone belongs.

div.h3: Ready to Build the Future With Us?
div.p: Join PETRORAQ and be part of a team delivering excellence every day.

t.t-esc: job.contract_type_id.name if job._fields.get('contract_type_id') and job.contract_type_id else 'Full-time'

div.p: Employment Type
Open Positions

h4.t-esc: job.address_id.city if job.address_id and job.address_id.city else 'Remote'

div.p: Work Location
Review Time
Join our team and build the future with PETRORAQ

div.label: Skills
div.small: Add all relevant skills from the list.

div.p: Application Submitted
div.div:
Thank you for applying to PETRORAQ!
Your application has been successfully received and our team will review it within 3–5 business days. You will receive next-step communication if your profile matches the role requirements.
